channel.description: Latest marine jobs for Catering Staff
channel.title: Maritime Union - Job for Mariners

item.description:
Location:
Description:

A Sous Chef position is available on a cruise line vessel. The role involves assisting the Chef De Cuisine and Executive Chef in managing galley operations, taking full control of assigned galley areas when needed, and leading a multi-cultural culinary team. A minimum of eight years of culinary experience, including three years as a Sous Chef in a premium hospitality environment, is required. Fluent English communication skills are essential.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Sous Chef Job on Cruise Line at AirBorne Recruiting

item.description:
Location:
Description:

A Sous Chef position is available on a cruise line vessel. The role involves assisting the Chef De Cuisine and Executive Chef in managing galley operations, leading a multicultural culinary team, and maintaining high grooming standards. Candidates require a minimum of eight years of culinary experience, including three years as a Sous Chef in a premium hospitality environment, with advanced culinary skills and fluent English communication.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Sous Chef Job on Cruise Ship at AirBorne Recruiting

item.description:
Location:
Description:

A Sous Chef position is available on a cruise line vessel. The role involves assisting the Chef De Cuisine and/or Executive Chef in managing galley operations, leading a multi-cultural culinary team, and maintaining high grooming standards. Candidates require a minimum of eight years of culinary experience, including at least three years as a Sous Chef in a premium hospitality environment, with advanced culinary skills and fluent English communication.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Sous Chef Job on Cruise Line at AirBorne Recruiting

item.description:
Location:
Description:

A Sous Chef position is available on a cruise line vessel. This role requires a minimum of eight years of culinary experience, including at least three years as a Sous Chef in a premium hospitality environment. Advanced culinary skills and fluent English communication are essential. The successful candidate will assist the Executive Chef in managing galley operations and lead a multi-cultural culinary team.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Sous Chef Job on Cruise Line at AirBorne Recruiting

item.description:
Location:
Description:

A Sous Chef position is available on a cruise line vessel. The role involves assisting the Chef De Cuisine and Executive Chef in galley operations, taking full control of assigned galley areas when needed, and leading a multi-cultural culinary team. Requirements include a minimum of eight years of culinary experience, with at least three years as a Sous Chef in a premium hospitality environment, advanced culinary skills, and fluent English communication.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Sous Chef Job on Cruise Line at AirBorne Recruiting

item.description:
Location:
Description:

A Sous Chef is sought for a cruise line position, requiring at least eight years of culinary experience, including three years in a similar role with a premium brand. Candidates must possess advanced culinary skills, excellent cooking techniques, and creativity. Fluency in English with strong communication abilities is essential for menu and recipe explanation. The role involves assisting the Chef De Cuisine and Executive Chef in managing galley operations and leading a multicultural team.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Sous Chef Job on Cruise Line at AirBorne Recruiting

item.description:
Location:
Description:

A Sous Chef position is available on a cruise line vessel. The role involves assisting the Chef De Cuisine and/or Executive Chef in managing galley operations, taking full control of an assigned galley area in their absence, and leading a multi-cultural culinary team. Requirements include a minimum of eight years of culinary experience, with at least three years as a Sous Chef in a premium hospitality environment, and fluent English communication skills.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Sous Chef Job on Cruise Line at AirBorne Recruiting

item.description:
Location:
Description:

A cruise line is seeking a Sous Chef with at least eight years of culinary experience, including three years in a similar role within a premium hospitality environment. The position requires advanced culinary skills, excellent cooking techniques, and fluency in English. The role involves assisting the Chef De Cuisine and/or Executive Chef in managing galley operations and leading a multi-cultural culinary team.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Sous Chef Job on Cruise Line at AirBorne Recruiting

item.description:
Location: Tromso
Description:

A Cook is sought for a small bunkering tanker. The contract duration is 12 weeks, with joining expected at the end of July in Tromso. The net salary offered is 2600 USD per month. Applicants require a basic oil tanker certificate, relevant experience on similar vessels, valid STCW documents, a medical certificate, and good English proficiency.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Cook Vacancy on Bunkering Tanker 2600 USD at OJ Crew

item.description:
Location: Europe
Description:

A Cook position is available on a Multipurpose Offshore Vessel operating in Europe. The contract duration is 6 weeks, with a joining date of July 14, 2026. This role is suitable for experienced catering staff seeking opportunities at sea.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Cook Vacancy on Multipurpose Offshore Vessel at ORCA Crew Services
